bp_title: Cost optimization — full BP enumeration + GC3B2-01 anchor verification
question_stem: Certify the GENCOST pillar fully walked: confirm no focus area / BP missed, and verify the one outstanding unverified anchor (GENCOST03-BP02 -> GC3B2-01). Pages fetched + verified 2026-06-27.
verbatim_text: cost-optimization.html lists exactly 5 focus areas: GENCOST01 Model selection and cost optimization; GENCOST02 Generative AI pricing model; GENCOST03 Cost-aware prompting; GENCOST04 Cost-informed vector stores; GENCOST05 Cost-informed agents. BP counts per focus area (verified from each gencostNN.html): CO01=1 (BP01), CO02=2 (BP01,BP02), CO03=4 (BP01-04), CO04=1 (BP01), CO05=1 (BP01) = 9 BPs. GENCOST03-BP02 live steps (gencost03-bp02.html): 1 define minimalist response scheme; 2 inform model of scheme in prompt; 3 introduce response-length control (hard limit hyperparameter + deterministic-response prompt extension); 4 set hard limit on response length via response-length hyperparameter; 5 continue testing/optimizing.
outcome_note: GENCOST CERTIFIED FULLY WALKED 2026-06-27. Enumeration verified: 5 focus areas (no GENCOST06), 9 BPs total, all accounted for — 7 promoted (GC1B1-01, GC2B2-01, GC3B1-01, GC3B2-01, GC3B3-01, GC4B1-01, GC5B1-01), 2 not_promoted (CO02-BP01 absorbed by GC1B1-01; CO03-BP04 vendor-tag micro-optimisation). GC3B2-01 anchor VERIFIED: live gencost03-bp02.html steps confirm the reconstructed mandate; framework_mappings.aws.mapping_state flipped unverified -> verified, last_checked -> 2026-06-27, GC3B2-01 bumped to v1.0.2 with a change_history entry. principles.json parses, 25 standards, format_version 1.13 unchanged. lens_mapping.md GENCOST header stamped FULLY WALKED with the enumeration; both GC3B2-01 unverified notes flipped. Five AWS pillars now stamped fully walked: GENOPS, GENSEC, GENPERF, GENREL, GENCOST. Only GENSUS remains (intentionally omitted).
open_items: S3 re-upload needed again — GC3B2-01 v1.0.2 changed principles.json after the earlier upload; re-upload ea/principles.json + Refresh. Optional remaining threads: GENREL04 schema-extension ADRs (hyperparameter_ranges/model_compatibility/model_card); GENREL05-BP03 target_regions GO2B3-01 extension; reliability-family EU AI Act Art 15 pass. None blocking.
next_candidates: All six AWS GenAI Lens pillars resolved (5 walked + GENSUS omitted). No further BP walks remain. Next work is optional: apply the logged schema-extension ADRs, the EU AI Act reliability pass, or a fresh AWS Lens revision re-verification. User to pick.
